commit.message:
fix: window hidden on start, wider (500px), show below tray on launch

- Hidden: true always (window never floats on launch)
- Width 420->500, Height 620->640, MinWidth 360->420
- ApplicationStarted event calls tray.ShowWindow() to drop panel below icon
  (skipped when --login flag is set, so silent on boot)
- Left-click on tray icon now correctly toggles the panel (was hiding an
  already-visible window because it started visible)
- PopOut snap-back size updated to match 500x640

commit.message:
feat: migrate to Wails v3 with native system tray

- Upgrade github.com/wailsapp/wails/v2 -> v3.0.0-alpha.74
- Remove all CGO tray code (tray_darwin.go/m, tray_stub.go, tray.go)
  Wails v3 handles system tray natively with no run loop conflicts
- main.go: application.New() + app.SystemTray.New()
  tray.AttachWindow(window).WindowOffset(5) — window drops down below tray icon
  --login flag hides window on launch-at-login
  LSUIElement=true in Info.plist (no Dock icon, menubar only)
- app.go: ctx -> app+window fields; startup/shutdown -> ServiceStartup/ServiceShutdown
  wailsRuntime.* -> window.Show/SetSize/SetAlwaysOnTop/Center/Focus
- chat.go: EventsEmit -> window.EmitEvent
- frontend: install @wailsio/runtime; EventsOn -> Events.On
- Info.plist: static (no v2 templates); LSUIElement=true

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: replace fyne.io/systray with direct CGO NSStatusItem

fyne.io/systray called dispatch_main() which causes a SIGTRAP when Wails'
NSApp is already running on the main thread. Replace with a separate
tray_darwin.m that uses dispatch_async(dispatch_get_main_queue()) to create
an NSStatusItem without taking over the main run loop.

- Remove fyne.io/systray dependency entirely
- tray_darwin.m: NSStatusItem + NSMenu via dispatch_async (no dispatch_main)
- tray_darwin.go: Go bindings + //export callbacks for show/quit
- tray_stub.go: no-op for non-darwin builds
- app.go: startup calls initTray(a) directly (no goroutine needed)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: billy goat menubar icon (32px, black/transparent template)

- Custom billy goat SVG-style icon drawn with Python PIL at 4x antialiased
  then scaled to 32x32: curved horns, head, hollow ears, eyes with
  horizontal-slit goat pupils, beard teardrop
- Properly a macOS template image: black on transparent, macOS inverts
  automatically for dark/light menu bar
- Fix app install: rm -rf /Applications/Billy.app before copy so new binary
  (named 'Billy') replaces old one (named 'billy-wails')
- LSUIElement=true confirmed in built Info.plist (hides from Dock)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: billy-wails
repository.description: Billy companion menubar app — Wails v2 (Go + React/TS)

commit.message:
feat: AI-generated titles, full read/write DB, conversation resumption

- AI title generation: after first exchange, Ollama generates a 3-6 word
  title via /api/generate; updates DB + emits conv:titled to frontend
- Full read/write DB access (removed mode=ro); ensureSchema creates tables
  on first launch so app works even without prior CLI usage
- Conversations created in app.go before goroutine (fixes currentConvID
  not being set back from goroutine)
- SetActiveConversation: resume any history item from sidebar or CLI;
  new messages append to the same DB conversation
- NewConversation: explicitly start fresh (called on clear/⊘ button)
- AddMemory / DeleteMemory bound methods; memory input in sidebar
- conv:titled event updates title in sidebar + titlebar live
- Active conversation highlighted in history sidebar
- Titlebar shows AI-generated conversation title while chatting

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: billy-wails
repository.description: Billy companion menubar app — Wails v2 (Go + React/TS)

commit.message:
feat: direct DB access, system prompt, history/memories sidebar, menubar mode

- Add modernc.org/sqlite: reads ~/.localai/history.db directly (no billy serve needed)
- db.go: readConversations, readMessages, readMemories, buildSystemPrompt
- System prompt auto-injected on every chat: Billy identity + memories from CLI
- Bound methods: GetConversations, GetMessages, GetMemories
- Remove BillyInstalled from StatusInfo (billy serve not implemented yet)
- tray.go: real fyne.io/systray implementation (show/quit menu)
- Info.plist: LSUIElement=true — hides from Dock, menubar-only app
- Frontend: history sidebar (🕐) + memories sidebar (🧠) in titlebar
- Load past CLI conversations into chat with one click
- Remove misleading 'Billy CLI not found' banner

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: billy-wails
repository.description: Billy companion menubar app — Wails v2 (Go + React/TS)

commit.message:
feat: theme settings — dark/light/system with persistent preference

- Settings button (⚙) in titlebar opens animated panel
- Three theme modes: System (default), Dark, Light
- System mode follows macOS appearance preference via prefers-color-scheme
- Preference persisted in localStorage, applied on next launch
- Light theme uses clean off-white palette matching billy brand
- Settings panel dismisses on outside click or theme selection

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: initial billy-wails scaffold — Wails v2.11 + React/TS chat UI

- System tray integration (stub, ready for energye/systray once wired)
- Chat panel with streaming AI via Ollama /api/chat SSE
- Prefers billy serve (127.0.0.1:7437) over direct Ollama when available
- GetStatus: reports billy installed, serving, ollama ready, tier, model
- ListModels: populates model picker from Ollama /api/tags
- PopOut: toggles between tray-panel size and floating window
- OpenInstallPage: opens billy-web install section in browser
- Dark theme matching billy-web brand colors
- macOS: hidden inset titlebar, dark aqua appearance, translucent window
- Windows: Mica backdrop support
- HideWindowOnClose: stays alive in tray instead of quitting
- CLI detection + 'Install Billy' banner if not found

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

so stale tasks skip outdated event data.

repository.name: sampo
repository.description: Automate changelogs, versioning, and publishing—even for monorepos across multiple package registries 🧭

commit.message:
Feat/emacs pkg (#4)

* feat: add summary DTOs and QuerySummaries for lightweight log listing

- Create internal/management/dto.go with LogSummary, LogListResponse,
  LogDetailResponse, LogDetailEntry, StreamViewResponse, BodyResponse,
  and APIError types
- Add database.LogSummary struct to models.go for DB scan targets
- Add LogReader.QuerySummaries() method selecting only summary columns
  (no bodies/headers) with computed body-length fields
- Update apiLogsHandler to use QuerySummaries and return LogListResponse
  envelope with pagination metadata (limit, offset, has_more)
- Update apiLogByIDHandler to return LogDetailResponse with decoded
  headers and no body fields
- Add writeAPIError, decodeHeaders, derefStr helpers
- Add ManagementConfig.PreviewBytes (default 65536) with validation
- Update example-config.yaml with preview_bytes setting
- Remove old logDetailResponse/streamViewResponse types from api.go

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add FTS5 full-text search indexing for openai_logs

- Add ftsSchema constant with FTS5 virtual table and sync triggers
- Add migrateFTS() with automatic rebuild for existing data
- Update buildWhere() to use FTS5 MATCH instead of LIKE
- Add FTS5 search test with distinct body content
- Enable sqlite_fts5 build tag in build script and Dockerfile

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Wire query parser into list API and add body retrieval endpoint

- Add query DSL support to apiLogsHandler via the 'query' parameter,
  using internal/query.Parse and query.ToSQL. Old individual params
  (status, path, since, until, q) remain as backward-compatible fallback.
- Add QuerySummariesRaw and CountRaw methods to LogReader that accept
  extra WHERE clause and args for the parsed query DSL.
- Add GET /api/logs/{id}/body endpoint with part (req/resp), mode
  (raw/assembled), and full parameters. Uses streamview.Build for
  assembled mode.
- Refactor apiLogByIDHandler into apiLogSubHandler that dispatches
  between detail and body sub-routes.
- Add PreviewBytes field to ServerDeps, wired from config.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Update web UI for new management API endpoint split

- Replace three separate filter inputs (status, path, search) with a
  unified query DSL input that sends a 'query' parameter
- Update detail modal to use new API shape: headers are now parsed
  objects (req_headers/resp_headers) instead of JSON strings
- Add on-demand body loading via GET /api/logs/{id}/body endpoint
  with Load Request/Response Body buttons and Load Full for truncated
- Stream view assembled toggle now fetches from body endpoint
- Show included_bytes / total_bytes info from body responses
- Update index.html to match new single query filter input

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add comprehensive tests for body endpoint, query DSL, and summary shape

- Body endpoint tests (10): raw req/resp, assembled SSE, invalid
  combination, preview truncation, full mode, not found, empty body,
  default params, invalid part
- Query DSL wiring tests (2): filter by status code, parse error
- Summary list shape test (1): verify has_request_body/has_response_body
  present and body/header fields absent

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: emacs pkg: memoryelaine (and adptions)

  Implementation Complete — All 21 Tasks Done

  Phase 1: Go Server (11 tasks)

   - API redesign: Summary/detail/body endpoint split — list returns lightweight summaries, detail returns metadata+headers (no bodies), body endpoint serves content on demand
   - FTS5 indexing: Full-text search on request/response bodies with sync triggers and auto-migration
   - Query DSL parser: status:200 method:POST path:/chat "exact phrase" with parameterized SQL (no injection)
   - Web UI + TUI: Updated to use new API (query DSL input, on-demand body loading)
   - 28 server tests (14 new), updated docs and design spec

  Phase 2: Emacs Package (10 tasks)

  8 modules in /work/emacs/:

   - memoryelaine.el — entry point, defcustoms, autoloads
   - memoryelaine-auth.el — auth-source → explicit → interactive prompt
   - memoryelaine-http.el — async curl with generation counters, stale response suppression
   - memoryelaine-state.el — global search + buffer-local detail state
   - memoryelaine-search.el — tabulated-list-mode with query DSL, pagination, recording toggle, live search
   - memoryelaine-show.el — detail buffer with on-demand body loading, stream view toggle
   - memoryelaine-log.el — timestamped diagnostic buffer
   - memoryelaine-test.el — 25 ERT tests, all passing

  Test Results

   - 143 Go tests passing | 25 Emacs ERT tests passing

* Emacs build script, code review, and second opinion

* docs: fix mismatches between spec/README and Go implementation

- Fix DSL flag names: is:truncated -> is:req-truncated/is:resp-truncated,
  has:req-body/has:resp-body -> has:req/has:resp (matches parser.go)
- Fix assembled mode description: returns available:false with reason,
  does not fall back to raw (matches api.go)
- Add limit, offset, has_more to /api/logs response example (matches dto.go)
- Add Emacs client to list of consumer surfaces

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add Gemini 3.1 Pro's patch review.

commit.message:
feat: dual-track level mappings with Manager/IC titles and pinned title override

Add support for the same level mapping to different titles based on
whether someone is a Manager or Individual Contributor.

Dual-track mapping:
- LevelMapping gains optional managerDisplayTitle field
- LevelStore.resolveTitle() accepts isManager param
- Auto-detects manager vs IC from tree structure (has children)
- Falls back to IC/default title when no manager title set
- 3-column CSV import/export (backward compatible with 2-column)

Pinned title override:
- OrgNode gains pinnedTitle boolean field
- OrgStore.pinTitle()/unpinTitle() methods with undo support
- Auto-pins when user manually edits title via updateNode()
- Property panel shows pin indicator with toggle
- Inline editor only sends title to updateNode when actually changed

UI changes:
- Level Mapping Panel: 3-column table (Level | IC Title | Manager Title)
- Property Panel: pin indicator, auto-title hint when pinned
- Renderer: passes isManager + pinnedTitle through resolveTitle chain
- PPTX export: uses dual-track resolved titles

21 files changed, 57 new tests across 6 test files.

commit.message:
fix: load correct tree after deleting active chart

When deleting the active chart, handleDeleteChart() was not calling
onChartSwitch() with the new active chart. This left OrgStore holding
the deleted chart's tree, so the remaining chart displayed stale data.

Now checks if the deleted chart was active, and after deletion calls
onChartSwitch() with the new active chart to update OrgStore.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: arbol
repository.description: Browser-based org chart editor with real-time D3 visualization
